utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh my God , it is her , it is that Victoria Secret model . Something ... something Goodacre .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: She is right , it is Jill . Jill Goodacre . Oh my God . I am trapped in an ATM vestibule with Jill Goodacre !

emotion_cause.span: 3_I am trapped in an ATM vestibule with Jill Goodacre !

utterances.speaker: Jill
utterances.text: Yeah , I am fine . I am just stuck at the bank , in an ATM vestibule .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Jill says vestibule ... I am going with vestibule .

utterances.speaker: Jill
utterances.text: I am fine . No , I am not alone ... I do not know , some guy .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh ! Some guy . Some guy . Hey Jill , I saw you with some guy last night . Yes , he was some guy .
